stories.headline: Ukraine summons Israel's ambassador over allegedly stolen grain being shipped to Haifa

stories.headline: Cole Tomas Allen, Correspondents’ Dinner Shooting Suspect, Was Propelled by Outrage, Authorities Say

stories.headline: King Charles’s rare state visit offers U.K. a chance to mend ties with Trump

stories.headline: Thousands held by paramilitary RSF in Sudan’s el-Fasher: NGO
stories.summary: Hundreds of women and children among those detained by the rebel group, says Sudan Doctors Network.

stories.summary: Oil held a gain as traders weighed the next steps toward peace talks over the Iran war, with the US discussing a proposal from Tehran while the crucial Strait of Hormuz remained almost impassable.

stories.headline: Merz suggests Ukraine’s EU membership may depend on territorial concessions

That will not work. Even January 1, 2028, is not realistic."

stories.headline: White House to review security in light of shooting at correspondents’ dinner
